governing_requirement: Build reproducible clean release packages and byte-verified atomic install/rollback commands that reject editable or dirty source authority, unpinned builds, stale installed files and any mismatch with the adopted release catalog.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-10.04 remains blocked by both declared prerequisites and by missing production packaging/install/rollback implementation. The dependency-light developer node installer receives limited foundation credit.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping and additive implementation packet. Current probes reproduce its stale-file, manifest, rollback and wheel-build findings. Its dependency states are superseded, and the current Conda environment pin is stated precisely here.

verified_foundations: install_node_pack copies the dependency-light node module, governed workflow JSON files and a localhost-only configuration into an isolated ComfyUI tree.
The installed node module remains read-only against package data and avoids heavy runtime dependency imports.
Two focused installer/runtime tests pass and Ruff reports no issues on the installer and test file.
env/maskfactory_env.yml pins wheel 0.47.0 and setuptools 78.1.0, although the active system interpreter used for the governed probe does not have wheel installed.

direct_probes.procedure: Seed custom_nodes/maskfactory_nodes/stale_unpublished_node.py, then run install_node_pack in a temporary ComfyUI tree.

confirmed_gaps: The installer resolves bytes from the editable working tree and cannot distinguish a signed published release from preserved uncommitted changes.
copytree(..., dirs_exist_ok=True) mutates the live target in place and preserves extra stale or malicious files.
No closed installed-file manifest, per-file hash verification, release identity, atomic active pointer, receipt-last marker or recovery state is written.
No prior-release snapshot, rollback callable/CLI, exact prior-tree restoration or rollback verification transaction exists.

pyproject.toml uses ranged build requirements (setuptools>=68 and wheel); env/requirements.lock.txt does not pin wheel, and the active system interpreter lacks wheel, so the no-network clean-build probe fails.
No governed two-build reproducibility proof verifies wheel, node-pack, workflow, schema, entry-point and installed inventory hashes.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths remain absent and clean. Candidate paths and frozen v1 contracts are read-only; the scope is disjoint from held MF-P6-10.01 paths and preserved MF-P6-08.05 changes.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-10.01 and MF-P6-10.02 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits only the basic developer node-copy/config behavior. It does not build a reproducible production release, install from a trusted catalog, detect stale files, prove atomicity/recovery, roll back a release, complete either prerequisite, or complete MF-P6-10.04.
